description: Progressive drain scaling — T038. Drain increases from -1 to -2 after card 15, then -3 after card 25.

additions: drainLifeScaled() action — reads cardsPlayed, picks drain amount from staged thresholds, applies immutable update
Imported 4 new drain constants from Constants.ts

changes.change: Game loop step 2: state().drainLife() replaced with state().drainLifeScaled()

design_rationale: cardsPlayed is read BEFORE incrementCardsPlayed() in the same loop iteration. So at drain call: cardsPlayed=0 on card 1, cardsPlayed=14 on card 15 (stage2 triggers at >=15 — i.e. the 16th card). This means stage2 starts around card 16 in UX terms. Intentional — gives player 15 safe cards before pressure escalates.
balance_impact: Cards 1-15: drain -1/card (15 hp total). Cards 16-25: drain -2/card (20 hp over 10 cards). Cards 26+: drain -3/card. With avg heal +4.7/card, stage1 is net positive (+3.7), stage2 is net positive (+2.7), stage3 is net positive (+1.7). Player still viable but not immune. Combined with faction events this creates meaningful late-run tension.
